text:
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was published as a chapter in the book "Drawing Inferences from Self-Selected Samples" in 1986. The cited author name "Richard Robb Jr" is a minor variation of the actual author "Richard Robb," which does not constitute a hallucination.

LINK: https://doi.org/10.1007/978-1-4612-4976-4_7
FOUND_TITLE: Alternative methods for solving the problem of selection bias in evaluating the impact of treatments on outcomes
FOUND_AUTHORS: James J. Heckman, Richard Robb
FOUND_YEAR: 1986
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
